steps.t: Ezôti has revealed where he keeps his captive animals. Share this information with Gûshida. Gûshida is in the Upper Ward of Umbar Baharbêl.
Gûshida told you to meet her at Ezôti's hiding place. Ezôti's hiding place is inside an unassuming flat in the Upper Ward of Umbar Baharbêl, to the no…
Ezôti's captive animals are in poor condition. Gûshida has asked you to help check on them. Ezôti's hiding place is inside the Upper Ward of Umbar Bah…
You have inspected the animals and should report back to Gûshida. Gûshida can be found in Ezôti's hiding place in the Upper Ward of Umbar Baharbêl.
